ab: anak cu kuncik ci pila’ sinang?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: ho’ ga! pira’ ka kacikan su’?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: anak cu kuncik ci pila’ sinang? ṟumungi’ cu maras la.
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: ini’ cu nak aras ci pila’ uṟi wa!
en: B: I don’t have any money either!

ab: anak cu kuncik ci pila’ sinang? ṟumungi’ cu maras la.
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: aṟat cu, ini’ haku beni ka kincikan su’ pilaw na.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven’t paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: anak cu kuncik ci lukus su?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: ho’, agal nak.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: anak cu kuncik ci patas su?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: wal mu pakacikan ci ka Iwal la.
en: B: I lent it to Iwal.

ab: pakacikiy cu ci ritensay’ su’ aw?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: ho’, wahi’ matu’ cuxan kay.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: nel umolax la, ini’ cu aṟas ci taṟasi’ pakacikiy cu ci taṟasi’ su’ aw?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎？
en: A: It’s raining, I don’t have an umbrella, can I borrow one?

ab: pagaluw ta maktaṟasi’, utux baliy ka taṟasi’ mu.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let’s stick together!

ab: ni, kani ka patas kincik mu sinang pilaw.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: patas amol ka maktaxan su’ na, kaṟali’ cu.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: babi’ misu kanon ka pila’ kincik mu la?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: eri nak, maki ka pila’ su’ la ga , beni cu la.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn’t matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: babi’ su’ kanon ka pila’ kincikan su kinang la?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: be’an mi’ su’ cuxan la.
en: A: I will return it to you tomorrow.

ab: kanon babi’ haku ka patas kincikan su’ la?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: wal misu be’an ci hiṟa’ la ca?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn’t I return it to you yesterday?

ab: pinkacik sinang ni Yukan ka papatas hani?
en: A: Did Yukan lend you this pen?

ab: ho’ kincikan mu hiyan soni.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: kincikan su Yukanan ka papatas hani?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Yukan?

ab: aṟat wa, bininiy ni yaya’ mu.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: usa’ kacik tikiy ci timu’ ni Temi hang, ungat ka timu’ la.
en: A: We are out of salt, go borrow some from Temi.

ab: ho’, maha’ cu kuncik.
en: B: Okay, I’ll borrow it.

ab: wahi cu matu’ ci pila’ kincikan su’ si Temi.
en: B: Go tell Temi to give me my money back.

ab: piṟa’ ka pila’ alu’ing ni sinang?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
